function.name: board_write
function.description: Write an entry to the shared blackboard SQLite database for cross-agent communication. Returns the new entry id.

topic.description: Topic key to group related entries (e.g. 'review-001', 'plan', 'finding-x')

payload.description: Content to write (free-form text or JSON string; will be stored verbatim)

reply_to.description: Optional id of an existing board entry this is replying to (creates a thread)
